positive: Stylized maximalist celestial garden scene, depicting a dense, intertwined forest of bioluminescent flora and fauna. The central focus is a glowing, symmetrical archway of vines and luminous blossoms, leading into an unknown, star-dusted void. Include gentle, stylized mythical creatures like glowing hummingbirds and forest spirits integrated into the foliage. Composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, utilizing strong, contrasting silhouettes of leaves and vines against a deep indigo and nebula-swirl background. Use vibrant jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst) accented by neon cyan and warm gold light sources. Minimalist line art elements should outline the major structures, enhancing print readability. Studio lighting, ultra detailed, concept art, high contrast, clean illustration, suitable for apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, watermark, text, logo, trademark, low detail, grain, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, poorly drawn, bokeh, messy
